_notes.greeting_morning: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is the user display name. Spanish greetings (Buenos días/tardes/noches) are gender-neutral — no agreement issue.
_notes.notifications_new_singular: [PLURAL] ICU plural rules applied. Singular: '{count} notificación nueva'. Plural: '{count} notificaciones nuevas'.
_notes.notifications_new_plural: [PLURAL] See notes on singular form above.

projects.empty_state_body: Crea tu primer proyecto y empieza a construir tu sonido.
projects.project_card_delete_confirm: ¿Eliminar "{project_name}"? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
projects.storage_upgrade_prompt: Usas el {percent} % de tu almacenamiento. {upgrade_link} para ampliar.
projects.storage_almost_full: Almacenamiento casi lleno — amplía el plan

_notes.project_card_bpm_label: BPM is a universal abbreviation — kept as-is per en-US notes.
_notes.project_card_key_label: Transcreation decision: 'Key' rendered as 'Clave' (musical key in Spain usage). 'Tonalidad' is more technically precise but too long for a tight badge label (9 chars vs 5).
_notes.project_card_last_edited: [PLACEHOLDER] {time_ago} is a relative time string generated at runtime.
_notes.project_card_delete_confirm: [PLACEHOLDER] {project_name} is user-generated content. Quotation marks kept as standard marks per es-ES locale conventions.
_notes.storage_upgrade_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {percent} is an integer; space before % per es-ES convention. {upgrade_link} is an inline hyperlink. [EXPANSION RISK] Monitor layout.

_notes.template_beatmaker: Anglicism kept — 'Beatmaker' is widely understood in Spain music production community.
_notes.template_singer_songwriter: Transcreation: 'Singer-songwriter' → 'Cantautor' (established Spanish term, shorter than EN source).
_notes.template_film_score: Transcreation: 'Film score' → 'Banda sonora' (standard Spanish term for the musical score of a film, not a rating).
_notes.template_sound_design: [REVIEW] En-US notes state anglicism preferred in ES. 'Sound design' kept in English. Confirm approved es-ES term with localization lead — not present in ontology.

studio.ai_composition_hint: Genera melodías, progresiones de acordes y patrones de batería con la IA de ECHOCRAFT. Tú decides qué se queda.

_notes.toolbar_loop: Anglicism kept — 'Loop' is universally understood in Spain music production contexts. 'Bucle' was considered but 'Loop' is standard DAW terminology.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saved: Transcreation: 'All changes saved' → 'Todo guardado' (13 chars vs 17 chars — shorter than EN, fits status bar well).
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saving: Trailing ellipsis (…) preserved to indicate loading state.
_notes.track_type_midi: MIDI is a technical acronym — kept as-is per ontology. 'Pista' used for 'track' per es-ES terminology rules.
_notes.ai_composition_label: Must match nav.ai_composition exactly — 'Composición con IA'.
_notes.ai_composition_hint: Transcreation decision: added 'Tú decides qué se queda' as required by es-ES market guide — AI transparency rule mandates a control/agency cue whenever AI is mentioned. Source intent (present AI capabilities) is preserved; agency cue reinforces user authorship per es-ES voice DNA.
